post.subject: Oh hell... where does we go from here?
post.body: SO everything seems to be getting a bit tiring. I have no money yet again - even though i just got paid on friday. Another month to wait until I get money again. But this time I will have a lot of money cos i have done a good bit of overtime over the last week and should be doing much more in the weeks to come! So this weekend i... worked. When i got home from work yesterday I really felt like doing something, so I went to the cinema to see Eurotrip. I dont really know what to say about this movie. I was really looking forward to it as the trailers looked very very funny, and yes, the film was very very funny... but it certainly wasnt a really amazing film or anything. So i will just say that as a bit of light entertainment, not to be analysed or disected too closely, it was pretty good. Sunday... work again. Im quite tired at the minute, though i would like to do something other than what i am doing. I wanna get high and talk to people...
